tracks.rawText: 5:4404-audio-05m44sUploadIndie pop track with a mid-tempo groove at 105 BPM in the key of E major, The arrangement features a clean, rhythmic electric guitar playing palm-muted eighth notes and syncopated staccato chords, A prominent synth bass provides a melodic, driving low-end with a rounded, analog tone, The drum kit consists of a tight, dry snare on beats 2 and 4, a steady kick pattern, and crisp hi-hats, Atmospheric synth pads and shimmering lead lines enter during the choruses to expand the stereo field, Male vocals are delivered in a smooth, breathy tenor, occasionally shifting into falsetto during melodic peaks, The production uses light plate reverb on the vocals and subtle delay on the lead guitars, A bridge section features a stripped-back arrangement with filtered synth textures before returning to the full ensemble3PublishRemix
tracks.title: 04-audio-05m44s

tracks.rawText: 4:1301-audio-02m29sUploadMid-tempo Latin pop ballad in G major at 90 BPM, The arrangement features a prominent nylon-string acoustic guitar playing syncopated fingerstyle patterns and melodic fills, A clean electric guitar provides ambient textures with light chorus and delay, The percussion consists of a steady shaker, a soft kick drum on the downbeats, and a crisp snare hitting on the backbeat with occasional rimshots, A warm, melodic electric bass follows the chord root notes with subtle slides, Male vocals occupy a tenor range, transitioning between a breathy chest voice and a smooth falsetto during the chorus, The production uses plate reverb on the vocals and guitars to create space, A bridge section features a rhythmic breakdown with handclaps and a filtered synth pad before returning to the full arrangement3PublishRemix
tracks.title: 01-audio-02m29s
